overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through a sunlit urban district. The scene begins at a police investigation of a crashed aircraft on a residential roof, then continues along a street revealing a massive circular megastructure in the background, passing by palm trees, billboards, and various commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: police investigation site with crashed aircraft on roof

agents.ego_description: walking past the police cordon investigating the crash site

notable_agents.action: police officer standing guard near the yellow police tape

entered.detail: wrecked aerodyne vehicle embedded in the roof of the house with smoke rising
two-story wooden house with damaged roof where the aircraft crashed
black and cyan police car parked at the curb with emergency lights
large black truck with yellow biohazard symbol parked on the street
yellow caution tape cordoning off the crash site

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a police investigation scene in a residential area. A crashed aerodyne vehicle smokes atop a wooden house, cordoned off with yellow police tape. An NCPD cruiser and hazmat truck are parked nearby as officers stand guard. The camera walks steadily forward past the police line.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition to open street with megastructure view

events.description: massive circular megastructure becomes visible as camera moves past the house

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the hazmat truck and damaged house

entered.detail: massive circular lattice structure dominating the skyline in the distance
tall palm tree trunk passing by the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves past the crash site, the view opens up to reveal a massive circular megastructure in the distance. The hazmat truck moves from right to center as the camera passes it, while the crashed aircraft and house recede to the right. Palm trees line the street as the urban landscape expands.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban arterial with commercial billboards

events.description: multiple vehicles including a red sports car and white truck drive past on the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk observing the passing traffic and skyline

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving down the multi-lane street

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying advertisements with animated faces
tall cylindrical skyscraper with glass facade in the distance
low-rise commercial structure with closed shutters and signage

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along a busy urban street with the megastructure now visible to the right. Large digital billboards and a distant corporate tower dominate the left side. Various vehicles including a red sports car pass by on the road as the camera maintains a steady walking pace along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with shops and palm trees

events.description: camera transitions from street view to sidewalk, entering a more pedestrian-focused commercial area

agents.ego_description: walking down the sidewalk following a pedestrian in red pants

notable_agents.action: person wearing red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: single-story commercial building with colorful signage and awnings
line of parked vehicles along the curb including a red sedan
wooden power line pole with multiple cables

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving along a commercial sidewalk away from the main street. The megastructure and billboards exit the frame as the focus shifts to shop fronts and parked cars. A pedestrian in red pants walks ahead in the same direction, and palm trees continue to line the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk that transitions from a restricted police crime scene into the expansive, sunlit bustle of a futuristic urban district. It begins by moving steadily past yellow police tape and a smoking aerodyne vehicle crashed atop a residential house, with NCPD cruisers and hazmat trucks stationed nearby. As the camera clears the crash site, the view opens up to reveal a massive circular megastructure looming in the distance while palm trees begin to line the expanding street. The scene then shifts along a busy thoroughfare where the megastructure remains visible to the right and large digital billboards and corporate towers dominate the left, with vehicles like a red sports car passing by. Finally, the camera turns away from the main road toward a commercial sidewalk, leaving the skyscrapers behind to follow a pedestrian in red pants past a series of shop fronts and parked cars.
